title: Special Enrollment Period
meta-description: Learn about special enrollment periods in the Health Insurance Marketplace®
bite: Learn about special enrollment periods in the Health Insurance Marketplace®
excerpt:
Updating income and household information

You or your dependents may qualify for a Special Enrollment Period if you have a life change. Learn more about what you should report.
content:
Updating income and household information

You or your dependents may qualify for a Special Enrollment Period if you have a life change. Learn more about what you should report.

Losing health coverage

Learn about some of the reasons for losing health coverage.
